settings.title: Shipping information

Ex: Shipping and return policies, size guides, and other common questions.

settings.testimonial: It will enable me to dominate the mud! Quick and easy shipping these tires look really rugged and I can’t wait to try them out! I'll buy these tires agian!
settings.author: Daniel

settings.testimonial: A great tire for plowing snow in Minnesota.... went on rims smoothly and sealed great highly recommend these to anyone
settings.author: Luke

settings.testimonial: I bought these tires for trail riding and my initial test of 66 miles will have me highly recommending these tires. Lastly they showed no signs of abrasion or wear after my ride.
settings.author: Chris
